name: fabric
description: Multi-provider agent session fabric — any agent (Claude / Codex / …) spawning and observing isolated child sessions of any provider. Ships a minimal Anthropic-compatible observe proxy that dissolves the Foundry-vs-tap conflict.

defaultPrompt: Use the Fabric plugin to run child model sessions of any provider (deepseek / claude / codex).
Tools: list_providers, resolve_model, run_task (one-shot headless child; codex supports write:true + cwd).
Pass observe:true to run_task to capture the child API traffic into runDir/http.jsonl.
